description: One-attempt local Codex smoke for the Vision companion runner. This is invocation evidence, not comparative evaluation evidence.

arms.prompt_prefix: Use Vision companion mode. First inspect the repository and convert the request into observable acceptance and explicit non-goals. Work in one bounded slice at a time. Treat tests and repository state as backpressure, preserve regressions, diagnose failures before retrying, and continue until the acceptance behavior is verified or a concrete blocker is proven. Model text and process exit alone are never completion evidence.

tasks.prompt: Fix the next-action selector. When all required checks pass, implemented-not-verified must return { kind: "promote-local-verification" }, locally-verified work targeting closure must return { kind: "request-protected-verification" }, and closure-verified work targeting delivery must return { kind: "request-delivery-verification" }. Preserve failed-check diagnosis, missing-check selection, completed-target termination, validation errors, and the stdin JSON CLI contract. Do not weaken or delete tests.
